title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation Benchmark (RGB)

defines.name: RGB
defines.definition: A bilingual benchmark for evaluating retrieval-augmented generation in large language models across four fundamental abilities: noise robustness, negative rejection, information integration, and counterfactual robustness.

problem: Existing RAG evaluation lacks a rigorous, comprehensive benchmark for diagnosing how different LLMs handle noise, missing evidence, multi-document reasoning, and false information.
